title: Easy Adventure
description: A lightweight base migration mod. Pack your entire building into a Spatial Scroll and carry it anywhere! 一个轻量级的基地迁移模组。通过空间卷轴一键打包并随身携带你的整个建筑！
body:
**Key Features**
 1. Spatial Scroll: Your magical portable storage. Right-click on a Base Core to bind and pack everything within the designated area into the scroll.
 2. Base Core: The heart of your capture zone. Simply place it in your base and right-click to open a GUI where you can freely adjust the capture area's size (X, Y, Z).
Instant Deployment: Found a new home? Just use your stored scroll on the ground, and your building will reappear exactly as it was.
 3. Safety First: The packing and unpacking process is carefully optimized to prevent block updates from breaking doors, sand, or other fragile structures.
 4. Atmospheric Effects: Enjoy immersive particles and a celebratory firework display with inspiring quotes when your base is successfully deployed! 
**How to Use**
 1. Craft & Place: Craft a Base Core and place it in the center of your building.
 2. Set the Area: Right-click the core (without a scroll) to set the capture dimensions via the GUI.
 3. Bind: Right-click the core with a Spatial Scroll to bind them.
 4. Pack: Right-click the bound core again with the scroll to start the "Packing" process. Once finished, you'll receive a scroll containing your building data.
 5. Deploy: Right-click the ground with the "Packed Scroll" to instantly reconstruct your base at the new location.
   啊啊啊啊啊伤心了，上传错版本了，等我优化后再上传新版本，有好多bug我都修复了还是上传错了呀
